name: folio
title: Folio
description: The résumé theme: one strong hire-me page plus an experience record that IS the CV. White paper, graphite ink, a single steel-blue accent — and a print stylesheet tuned so the whole record lands on one sheet of A4.

tokens.--font-body: everything — a CV is set in the system's Helvetica vernacular
tokens.--text-xs: smallest text: skills, captions, keyboard hints
tokens.--text-s: small text: meta lines, nav, footer, the identity rail
tokens.--text-xxl: page titles and the CV name
tokens.--leading-body: body line height — the vertical rhythm
tokens.--tracking-caps: letter spacing of the small uppercase labels
tokens.--color-text: graphite ink — body text and headings
tokens.--color-muted: secondary ink: meta, locations, the rail
tokens.--color-accent: the one steel-blue: links, period markers, focus rings
tokens.--measure: maximum width of the reading column
tokens.--rail-width: width of the identity rail on wide screens
tokens.--space-6: spacing scale — the gap between rail and content
tokens.--radius: corner rounding — small, a document has square edges
